name: Chicken and Pasta Salad =
recipeIngredient: 8 oz low-calorie Italian dressing (store bought or homemade)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions, then chill in ice water and drain.
2. Blanch broccoli in boiling water, chill in ice water, and drain.
3. Season chicken with half of the soy sauce and heat oil in a nonstick pan. Brown the chicken and reduce heat, finishing cooking without overcooking.
4. Slice chicken into 1-inch strips and cut into bite-sized pieces. Place in a bowl with other ingredients, excluding dressing and remaining soy sauce.
5. Mix the remainder of soy sauce into the dressing and pour over pasta, chicken, and vegetables. Toss gently and serve immediately. You may like to serve the salad semi-warm.
